message.title: message
message.description: Status message. If no slots available it will say so and the agent should ask the user to pick another date from the 7 day window.

slotDisplayList.title: slotDisplayList
slotDisplayList.description: Clean numbered list of available time slots on separate lines. Display this exactly as returned to the user without any modification or reformatting.

slotIdMap.title: slotIdMap
slotIdMap.description:
Number to slot label mapping in format
1##10:00 AM - 10:30 AM||2##10:30 AM - 11:00 AM.
Split on || to get entries then split each entry
on ## to get:
Part 1 = number
Part 2 = exact slot label to store and use.
Store silently. Never show to user.

totalCount.title: totalCount
totalCount.description: Total number of available time slots for the selected dealer and date.
